strengths: Successfully completed the outbound transfer phase, moving all 6 objects to the left side
Demonstrated proper bimanual coordination during mid-air transfers
Maintained steady camera positioning throughout the exercise
weaknesses: Failed to complete the return transfer phase within the time limit
Took excessive time (236 seconds) compared to the 300-second benchmark
Showed inefficient movement patterns during object manipulation

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth hand-to-hand exchanges
drills.targets_weakness: Inefficient movement patterns during object manipulation

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the complete task slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, emphasizing direct pickup and placement movements

progression_note: At the novice level, focus on completing the full task sequence consistently before pursuing speed improvements. Practice the basic transfer mechanics until you can reliably finish all 12 transfers within the time limit.
